历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 555, dropping to about 929 in 2024, and further to about 1029 in 2025, showing a continuous backward trend over the past three years, with a cumulative shift of about 474 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1029; the provincial science enrollment plan was 65 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 59 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 47, a reduction of about 20.3% compared to 2025, with a significant decrease in enrollment quotas, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 18th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with a stable ranking in the 16-18 range in recent years, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents and a history of admission cut-off drops; ranked 26th in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level; from 2022 to 2023, there was a sharp drop in the admission cut-off score for the civil engineering major, which has a certain lagging psychological impact on application decisions; it has 17 A- or above disciplines including A+ in civil engineering, A+ in urban and rural planning, A+ in environmental science and engineering, A+ in management science and engineering, and A in computer science and technology, with strong engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering are highly recommended in terms of social popularity, while civil engineering and architecture majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 238,000 (uncertain mark), a significant increase from about 76,500 in science and arts combined in 2025, with an estimated science candidate count of about 163,000 based on historical proportions, indicating significantly intensified competition, with an increase from the 390-point threshold in 2024, reflecting a tightening overall competition; Tongji University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong regional appeal to Xinjiang candidates; the university's science enrollment scale in Xinjiang is relatively large (59-65 in recent years), making it an important source of students in the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering core factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 1029, a significant reduction of about 20% in the 2026 science plan, and a notable increase in the total number of candidates in the province, competition intensifies, pushing the ranking forward (decreasing number); however, the negative reputation and the discouragement trend for civil engineering and architecture majors have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm, partially offsetting the enrollment reduction effect. After analysis, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 923, with a range of 813-1033.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 同济大学在新疆维吾尔自治区医学类近三年最低录取位次分别为：2023年555位（计划6人）、2024年929位（计划7人）、2025年1029位（计划7人）。位次呈持续上升趋势，2023 至2024年上升374位，2024至2025年再上升100位，显示医学类报考竞争逐年加剧。2026年医学类招生计划缩减至5人（较2025年减少2人，缩招约28.6%），且取消了原国豪精英班 （该专业2025年最低位次1029，为医学类门槛最低专业），剩余临床医学（5+3一体化）和医学试验班两个专业，整体招生门槛有所抬升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，位于上海市。学校综合实力雄厚，医学学科依托上海优质医疗资源，临 床医学等专业具有较高办学水平和行业认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来在全国范围内报考热度持续走高，临床医学作为长学制热门专业，在新疆地区竞争尤为激烈。同济大学地处上海，地域优势明显，对高分考生吸引力强。2026 年新疆医学类招生名额缩减，进一步加剧了竞争态势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型与历年位次趋势，预测2026年同济大学在新疆医学类最低录取位次约为913位，波动区间为821至1005位。位次较2025年（1029位）有所下降（更易进），主要 受缩招影响，但缩招幅度被近年持续上升的位次趋势部分抵消，整体仍处于高位区间。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Tongji University's Medicine category in Xinjiang Uygur Autonomous Region over the past three years are: 555th place in 2023 (planned enrollment of 6), 929th place in 2024 (planned enrollment of 7), and 1029th place in 2025 (planned enrollment of 7). Rankings have shown a continuous upward trend, rising by 374 places from 2023 to 2024, and by another 100 places from 2024 to 2025, indicating intensifying competition for Medicine admissions year by year. In 2026, the Medicine enrollment plan is reduced to 5 (a decrease of 2 from 2025, approximately 28.6% reduction), and the original Guohao Elite Class (which had the lowest minimum ranking of 1029 in 2025, the easiest to enter among Medicine majors) has been canceled. The remaining majors are Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) and Medical Experimental Class, raising the overall admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, located in Shanghai. The university has strong comprehensive strength, and its medical disciplines rely on Shanghai's high-quality medical resources. Majors such as Clinical Medicine have a high level of education and industry recognition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical majors has been rising nationwide, with Clinical Medicine, as a long-cycle popular major, facing particularly fierce competition in Xinjiang. Tongji University's location in Shanghai offers significant regional advantages, attracting high-scoring candidates. The reduction in Medicine enrollment quotas in Xinjiang in 2026 further intensifies the competitive situation.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model with historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Tongji University's Medicine category in Xinjiang in 2026 will be approximately 913th place, with a fluctuation range of 821 to 1005. The ranking is lower (easier to enter) compared to 2025 (1029th place), mainly due to the enrollment reduction, but the reduction is partially offset by the recent upward trend in rankings, still remaining at a high level overall.

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

(No Tier 3 majors in 2026)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target and use Tier 1 as a reach. In 2026, Medicine only has two majors: Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) is the most competitive, while Medical Experimental Class is relatively accessible. It is advisable to arrange them reasonably.
